structuredJson.summary: Associate AI/ML Engineer with a proven track record in architecting Agentic AI workflows and advanced RAG systems. Expert in leveraging LangGraph and LlamaIndex to automate complex business logic and improve data retrieval efficiency. A proactive problem-solver dedicated to deploying scalable, enterprise-grade AI solutions that drive operational impact.

workExperience.title: Associate AI/ML Engineer
responsibilities: Engineered advanced agentic AI systems using LangGraph for multi-step reasoning and decision-making workflows.
Developed scalable knowledge-based applications using LlamaIndex and Hierarchical Chunking strategy for efficient data indexing and retrieval.
Designed modular AI agent frameworks to automate business processes and improve operational efficiency.

workExperience.title: Trainee AI Engineer
responsibilities: Built and deployed AI-powered workflows using low-code platforms (Dify) and Python-based frameworks (LangChain).
Developed Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines integrating structured and unstructured data sources for enterprise use cases.
Designed and tested agentic AI solutions for workflow automation, including insurance-related process scenarios.
Integrated LLM-based applications with external APIs and databases to enable real-time data-driven responses.
Deployed and monitored AI services on Azure, ensuring scalability, security, and performance optimization.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Information and Communication Technology
education.institution: University of Sri Jayewardenepura, Sri Lanka

education.degree: G.C.E. Advanced Level - Physical Science Stream

projects.title: Log Classification With Hybrid Classification Framework
projects.description: Developed a hybrid classification framework for log classification using Python, pandas, scikit-learn, sentence-transformers, and FastAPI.

projects.title: Sales Insight Prediction Using Superstore Dataset
projects.description: Analyzed and predicted sales insights using the Superstore dataset with Python, Sci-Kit-learn, Pandas, Seaborn, Numpy, and Power BI.

projects.title: Analysis and Visualizing Wine Data (PyData Sri Lanka)
projects.description: Analyzed and visualized wine data using Python, Pandas, Plotly Dash, HuggingFace, and Transformers.

projects.title: WAITER_117 - Smart Waiter Robot for Restaurant
projects.description: Developed a smart waiter robot for restaurant automation using Arduino, PDE Controlling, IoT, and C++.

embeddingText: Nilupul Nishan is an Associate AI/ML Engineer with 1.2 years of experience specializing in architecting Agentic AI workflows and advanced Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems. With a strong foundation in Information and Communication Technology from the University of Sri Jayewardenepura, Nilupul has demonstrated expertise in leveraging tools like LangGraph, LlamaIndex, and Python to deploy scalable, enterprise-grade AI solutions. His professional journey includes roles at Softvil Technologies, where he contributed to the development of modular AI agent frameworks and scalable knowledge-based applications. Nilupul's technical proficiency spans cloud platforms like Azure and AWS, data analysis libraries such as Pandas and Numpy, and low-code platforms like Dify. He is also skilled in integrating LLM-based applications with APIs and databases for real-time data-driven responses. With certifications in Deep Learning, Machine Learning, and AWS Fundamentals, Nilupul is well-equipped to excel in roles requiring advanced AI/ML expertise. Ideal placements for Nilupul include mid-level to senior AI/ML engineering roles in industries like SaaS, FinTech, or enterprise automation, where his skills in workflow automation and scalable AI solutions can drive significant operational impact.
